testcase.name: Search for a term
testcase.error: java.lang.RuntimeException: Failed to initialize ChromeDriver at edu.eci.is.arcn.resources.steps.SearchSteps.setUp(SearchSteps.java:33) Caused by: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Search for a term # src/test/java/edu/eci/is/arcn/resources/features/google_search.feature:3 java.lang.RuntimeException: Failed to initialize ChromeDriver at edu.eci.is.arcn.resources.steps.SearchSteps.setUp(SearchSteps.java:33) Caused by: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Given I am on the Google search page # edu.eci.is.arcn.resources.steps.SearchSteps.i_am_on_the_google_search_page() When I search for "GitHub" # edu.eci.is.arcn.resources.steps.SearchSteps.i_search_for(java.lang.String) Then I should see "GitHub" in the results # edu.eci.is.arcn.resources.steps.SearchSteps.i_should_see_in_the_results(java.lang.String)
